headlines: FTX Recovery Trust starts $2.2B creditor distribution (Mar 31, 2026)
Weekly market note: ETF redemptions weigh on Bitcoin (Mar 30, 2026)
Morgan Stanley advances spot Bitcoin ETF filing (MSBT) (Mar 17–20, 2026)
Aave v4 launches on Ethereum (Mar 30, 2026) — major DeFi upgrade goes live

articles.title: FTX Recovery Trust begins $2.2B fourth distribution to creditors
articles.summary: FTX’s Recovery Trust started a roughly $2.2 billion payout to eligible creditors on March 31, 2026. Payments will be delivered through distribution partners such as BitGo, Kraken or Payoneer and should reach verified claimants within a few business days.

articles.title: Ethereum reclaims the $2,000 level as Q1 closes
articles.summary: Ether rose back above $2,000 on March 31, 2026 after recent volatility, giving traders some relief as the first quarter ends. Analysts point to a mix of ETF/staking flows, macro moves and technical buying that lifted ETH through the psychological level.

articles.title: Weekly market note: ETF redemptions pressured Bitcoin late March
articles.summary: A March 30 market update shows Bitcoin fell after accelerated ETF redemptions and macro headwinds; institutional flows remain a key driver for BTC price movement. The note highlights how ETF positioning and derivatives expiries can create sharp price swings.

articles.title: Morgan Stanley files amended S‑1 for spot Bitcoin ETF (ticker MSBT)
articles.summary: Morgan Stanley submitted a second amendment to its S‑1 registration for a spot Bitcoin ETF that would list on NYSE Arca under ticker MSBT. The filing added operational details (custody, basket size and seed capital) and signaled another major Wall Street entrant into the spot-BTC ETF market.

articles.title: Aave V4 goes live on Ethereum — major on‑chain lending upgrade
articles.summary: Aave launched its V4 upgrade on Ethereum on March 30, 2026. The update adds new money‑market features and cross‑protocol integrations designed to cut user friction and lower costs for borrowers and lenders.

articles.title: Ramp launches stablecoin accounts on Base for corporate customers
articles.summary: Payments platform Ramp launched stablecoin accounts on Coinbase’s Base Layer‑2 on March 30, 2026, offering corporate customers on‑chain USDC accounts to speed settlement and cut cross‑border costs. The move highlights growing real‑world stablecoin use by businesses.

articles.title: Binance Research flags five crypto risk signals (ETF rulings, geopolitics, stablecoin stress)
articles.summary: On March 30, 2026 Binance Research warned of five converging risk signals — including delayed SEC ETF rulings and geopolitical tensions — that could weaken crypto liquidity and boost volatility. The note put market participants on alert for liquidity events and policy shocks.

articles.title: Tether Gold (XAUt) lists on Tokocrypto and expands spot pairs
articles.summary: Tether Gold (XAUt) began trading on Tokocrypto with multiple pairs (XAUt/USDT, XAUt/USDC, XAUt/BTC) around March 30–31, 2026, widening tokenized‑gold access on major exchanges. Tokenized real‑world assets continue to spread across chains and venues.
